title: CPM Standardized Project Payload
description: 標準化專案排程交換契約 / Standardized project schedule exchange contract for the CPM SaaS. Used for project import/export and as the canonical shape exchanged between frontend, backend and ERP anti-corruption layer.

project_id.description: 專案代號 / Globally unique project identifier within a tenant.

tenant_id.description: 租戶代號 / Tenant identifier (multi-tenant isolation key, enforced by Postgres RLS).

region.description: 區域別 / Dual-region marker. TW = 台灣(繁中), CN = 中國大陸(简中). Drives i18n labels and notification channel (LINE vs DingTalk).

schedule_data.description: 排程任務清單 / Ordered list of schedule tasks forming the project DAG.

TaskDefinition.description: 單一排程任務定義 / A single schedule task. Mirrors backend TaskDefinition (Pydantic) and the tasks table.

task_id.description: 任務代號 / Task identifier, unique within a project.

task_name.description: 任務名稱 / Human-readable task name.

duration.description: 工期(天) / Duration in days. Non-negative.

predecessors.description: 前置任務代號清單 / List of predecessor task_ids (finish-to-start dependencies). Defines the DAG edges.

Status.description: 任務狀態 / Task lifecycle status. PENDING=待辦, IN_PROGRESS=進行中, COMPLETED=完成, DELAYED=延遲/延期.

ErpSyncConfig.description: ERP 拋轉設定 / ERP synchronization configuration for this project.

enabled.description: 是否啟用 ERP 拋轉 / Whether ERP push is enabled for this project.

target_erp.description: 目標 ERP 系統 / Target ERP system. SAP=SAP, DINGXIN_TW=鼎新(台灣), YONYOU_CN=用友(中國大陸).
